name: Pasta e. Fagioli
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the beans and cold water in a 6-quart pot and bring to a boil.
2. Cover the pot and turn off the heat (leave the pot covered on the burner used).
3. Allow the mixture to stand for 1 hour.
4. Drain the beans and return them to the pot. Add the wine and stocks, then bring to a boil. Cover and simmer gently for 30 minutes.
5. Strain out half of the beans and puree them. Return the purée to the pot.
6. Add the garlic, tomato paste, parsley, and raw tubetti pasta, then simmer gently uncovered for 25-30 minutes or until the pasta is very tender and the soup thickens. Stir the soup regularly to prevent the pasta from sticking to the bottom of the pot.
7. Stir in the Parmesan cheese. Garnish with chopped parsley, a drizzle of olive oil, and grated Parmesan cheese.
